steps.title: Add the equations first
steps.content: The fastest move is to add the two equations because the $-8(y+3)$ and $+8(y+3)$ terms cancel: $$(x-2)-8(y+3)=123$$ $$(x-2)+8(y+3)=432.$$

steps.title: Desmos graph check
steps.content: If you graph both equations in Desmos, the intersection has $x=279.5$, so $x-2=277.5$. This graph is only a confirmation of the elimination result above; the requested value is still $10(x-2)=2775$.

steps.title: Confirm the requested value
steps.content: The system does not ask for $x$ or $y$ by itself; it asks for $10(x-2)$. The computed value is 2775.
